---
title: "Part II: Building and Executing"
---

-   This part is about building the model, constructing the foundation for a fuctional simulation
-   intro to what is covered in the section
-   expected outcome for this section: creating input in order to run the model, generate output, and interpret results

## Chapters in this section

<div>

### [Chapter 5: User-Aquired Data](userdata.qmd)

Gathering and formatting the necessary ingredients

### [Chapter 6: RHESSys Specific Input Files](inputfiles.qmd)

Understanding the core file anatomy

### [Chapter 7: Preprocessing](preprocessing.qmd)

Assembling the model foundation

### [Chapter 8: Implementation & Execution](implementation.qmd)

Launching the simulation

### [Chapter 9: Postprocessing](postprocess.qmd)

Gaining model result insight

</div>
